> **Note.** Changes to the L1 schema (`AGENTS.md`) require discussion
> here before any PR. See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
> §"Changing the L1 schema". This template applies to all feature
> requests, schema or otherwise.

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Concrete failure mode, ideally
     from your own vault use. -->

## Proposal

<!-- What change do you want to see? Sketch the new behaviour or the
     edited schema text. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- List at least one alternative and why you prefer the proposal.
     "I haven't considered any" is a sign the proposal isn't ready. -->

## Impact on existing vaults

- [ ] No schema change required.
- [ ] Schema change is backward-compatible (no migration needed).
- [ ] Schema change is breaking (would require a migration script
      under `_system/scripts/migrate_NN_<slug>.py` and a
      `schema_version` bump).

## Affected red lines

<!-- Does this touch any of the L1 red lines in AGENTS.md §"Red lines"?
     If so, explain why the change is safe. If not, write "none". -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to AGENTS.md sections, related issues, prior art. -->
